The '''58th''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from February 7 to February 17, 2008.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/01_jahresblatt_2008/01_Jahresblatt_2008.html |title=58TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 7 – 17, 2008 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131104212804/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/01_jahresblatt_2008/01_Jahresblatt_2008.html| archive-date=4 November 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref> The festival opened with [[Martin Scorsese]]'s documentary film ''[[Shine a Light (film)|Shine a Light]]''.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.indiewire.com/article/iw_news_scorseses_shine_a_light_to_open_the_58th_berlinale |title=Scorsese's "Shine A Light" to Open the 58th Berlinale |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=indiewire|date=15 January 2008 }}</ref> ''[[Be Kind Rewind]]'' by [[Michel Gondry]] served as the closing film.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/08_pressemitteilungen_2008/08_Pressemitteilungen_2008-Detail_4376.html |title=THE 58TH BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL COMES TO A SUCCESSFUL CLOSE: MUSIC, STARS AND GRAND EMOTIONS |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20080602162846/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/08_pressemitteilungen_2008/08_Pressemitteilungen_2008-Detail_4376.html| archive-date=2 June 2008 | url-status= live}}</ref> Greek filmmaker [[Costa Gavras]], was selected to serve as the Jury President for the main competition.<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/08_pressemitteilungen_2008/08_Pressemitteilungen_2008-Detail_3738.html |title=BERLINALE 2008: OSCAR WINNER COSTA-GAVRAS TO BE JURY PRESIDENT |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20090227000351/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/08_pressemitteilungen_2008/08_Pressemitteilungen_2008-Detail_3738.html| archive-date=27 February 2009 | url-status= live}}</ref>

The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to ''[[Elite Squad]]'' directed by [[José Padilha]].<ref name="PRIZES" /> The retrospective dedicated to Spanish filmmaker [[Luis Buñuel]] was shown at the festival.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html#|title=RETROSPECTIVE|access-date=28 August 2014|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20170304113847/http://www.berlinale.de/en/das_festival/sektionen_sonderveranstaltungen/retrospektive/index.html|archive-date=4 March 2017|url-status=dead|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

== Juries ==
The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/04_jury_2008/04_Jury_2008.html |title=JURIES 2008 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de | archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023114244/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/04_jury_2008/04_Jury_2008.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

=== Main Competition ===
* [[Costa-Gavras]], Greek filmmaker and producer - Jury President
* Uli Hanisch, German production designer
* [[Diane Kruger]], German actress
* [[Walter Murch]], American director and editor
* [[Shu Qi]], Taiwanese actress and model
* [[Alexander Rodnyansky]], Russian producer

=== Best First Feature Award Jury ===
* [[Ben Barenholtz]], American producer and distributor
* [[Dominique Cabrera]], French filmmaker
* [[Jasmila Žbanić]], Bosnian filmmaker and producer

=== Short Film Competition Jury ===
* [[Marc Barbé]], French actor and director
* [[Ada Solomon]], Romanian producer
* [[Laura Tonke]], German actress

== Official Sections ==
[[File:Costa-Gavras - Vence.JPG|thumb|254x254px|[[Costa Gavras]], Jury President]]

== Official Awards ==
[[File:Jose Padilha by Gage Skidmore.jpg|thumb|200px|[[José Padilha]], winner of the Golden Bear at the festival]]
The following prizes were awarded by the Jury:<ref name="PRIZES">{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/03_preistr_ger_2008/03_Preistraeger_2008.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2008|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20131015122127/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2008/03_preistr_ger_2008/03_Preistraeger_2008.html| archive-date=15 October 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/58_ifb/58_IFB_Awards.pdf |title=2008 Berlin Awards|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130516113359/http://www.berlinale.de/media/pdf_word/service_7/58_ifb/58_IFB_Awards.pdf| archive-date=16 May 2013 | url-status= live}}</ref>

===Main Competition===
*'''[[Golden Bear]]''': ''[[Elite Squad]]'' by [[José Padilha]]

* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize|Silver Bear Grand Prize of the Jury]]: ''[[Standard Operating Procedure (film)|Standard Operating Procedure]]'' by [[Errol Morris]] 
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Paul Thomas Anderson]] for ''[[There Will Be Blood]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: [[Reza Naji]] for ''[[The Song of Sparrows]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: [[Sally Hawkins]] for ''[[Happy-Go-Lucky (2008 film)|Happy-Go-Lucky]]'' 
* [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: [[Wang Xiaoshuai]] for ''[[In Love We Trust]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': [[Jonny Greenwood]] for ''[[There Will Be Blood]]'' (score) 
*[[Alfred Bauer Prize]]: [[Fernando Eimbcke]] for ''[[Lake Tahoe (film)|Lake Tahoe]]''

== Independent Awards ==

=== [[International Federation of Film Critics#FIPRESCI Award|FIPRESCI Award]] ===
*[[Fernando Eimbcke]] for ''[[Lake Tahoe (film)|Lake Tahoe]]''
